The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   StringLiteral
    11	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    12	    ;
    13	
    14	postfixExpression
    15	    :   primaryExpression  
    16	        (   LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    17	        |   LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
    18	        )*
    19	    ;
    20	
    21	argumentExpressionList
    22	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    23	    ;
    24	
    25	unaryExpression
    26	    :
    27	    (postfixExpression
    28	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    29	    )
    30	    ;
    31	
    32	unaryOperator
    33	    :   Plus | Minus | Not | Star | And | Tilde
    34	    ;
    35	
    36	multiplicativeExpression
    37	    :   unaryExpression ((Star|Slash|Percent) unaryExpression)*
    38	    ;
    39	
    40	additiveExpression
    41	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus|Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    42	    ;
    43	
    44	relationalExpression
    45	    :   additiveExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    46	    ;
    47	
    48	equalityExpression
    49	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|NotEqual) relationalExpression)*
    50	    ;
    51	
    52	logicalAndExpression
    53	    :   equalityExpression (AndAnd equalityExpression)*
    54	    ;
    55	
    56	logicalOrExpression
    57	    :   logicalAndExpression (OrOr logicalAndExpression)*
    58	    ;
    59	
    60	assignmentExpression
    61	    :   logicalOrExpression
    62	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    63	    ;
    64	
    65	expression
    66	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    67	    ;
    68	
    69	declaration
    70	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    71	    ;
    72	
    73	declarationSpecifiers
    74	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    75	    ;
    76	
    77	declarationSpecifier
    78	    :   typeSpecifier
    79	    |   typeQualifier
    80	    ;
    81	
    82	initDeclaratorList
    83	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    84	    ;
    85	
    86	initDeclarator
    87	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    88	    ;
    89	
    90	typeSpecifier
    91	    :   Int | Char | Void
    92	    ;
    93	
    94	typeQualifier
    95	    :   Const
    96	    ;
    97	
    98	declarator
    99	    :   directDeclarator
   100	    ;
   101	
   102	directDeclarator
   103	    :   Identifier
   104	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
   105	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen
   106	    ;
   107	
   108	parameterTypeList
   109	    :   parameterList
   110	    ;
   111	
   112	parameterList
   113	    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
   114	    ;
   115	
   116	parameterDeclaration
   117	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   118	    ;
   119	
   120	initializer
   121	    :   assignmentExpression
   122	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? RightBrace
   123	    ;
   124	
   125	initializerList
   126	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
   127	    ;
   128	
   129	statement
   130	    :   compoundStatement
   131	    |   expressionStatement
   132	    |   selectionStatement
   133	    |   iterationStatement
   134	    |   jumpStatement
   135	    ;
   136	
   137	compoundStatement
   138	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   139	    ;
   140	
   141	blockItemList
   142	    :   blockItem+
   143	    ;
   144	
   145	blockItem
   146	    :   statement
   147	    |   declaration
   148	    ;
   149	
   150	expressionStatement
   151	    :   expression? Semi
   152	    ;
   153	
   154	selectionStatement
   155	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   156	    ;
   157	
   158	iterationStatement
   159	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   160	    |   Do statement While LeftParen expression RightParen Semi
   161	    ;
   162	
   163	jumpStatement
   164	    :   (Return expression?) Semi
   165	    |   Break Semi
   166	    |   Continue Semi
   167	    ;
   168	
   169	compilationUnit
   170	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   171	    ;
   172	
   173	translationUnit
   174	    :   externalDeclaration+
   175	    ;
   176	
   177	externalDeclaration
   178	    :   functionDefinition
   179	    |   declaration
   180	    ;
   181	
   182	functionDefinition
   183	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator compoundStatement
   184	    ;
   185	
   186	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
